summary: Fixed Foreman planner draft reuse so only source:"planner" drafts are reused; fallback drafts cause a fresh planner attempt. Added headless tests and updated INTERNALS.md.
filesChanged: extensions/foreman/planner.ts - added PersistedPlannerDraft export and shouldReusePersistedDraft predicate

extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh - added predicate and wiring assertions

raw:
## Completed
Implemented the Foreman planner draft reuse fix: persisted drafts are reused only when `source === "planner"`; persisted fallback drafts now trigger a fresh planner attempt and are then re-persisted as before.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - added `PersistedPlannerDraft` export and `shouldReusePersistedDraft()`.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - planning branch now uses `shouldReusePersistedDraft(persisted)`.
- `extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh` - added predicate assertions and grep guard for index wiring.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/INTERNALS.md` - documented the Gate 1 reuse behavior.

## How To Verify
`grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/docer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification passed. Pre-existing unrelated dirty files in the repo were left untouched.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)
